title: Footwear ornamentation assembly, ornamentation insert and related methods
abstract: A footwear ornamentation assembly includes at least one insert and a plurality of design members that can be mounted on the insert or a flip-flop for decoration purposes. The at least one insert is releasably affixed on top of a flip-flop sole. The plurality of design members present different appearances. A method for decorating a flip-flop using the flip-flop ornamentation assembly includes selecting the at least one insert from a plurality of inserts, affixing the selected insert to a top of the flip-flop sole, selecting one or more design members from the plurality of design members, and mounting the selected one or more design members to the at least one of the selected insert and the flip-flop.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A footwear ornamentation assembly comprising: an open-heeled footwear article having a sole; a first insert connected to a heel area of the sole; and a first design member releasably connected to the first insert. 2. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , wherein the open-heeled footwear article is a flip-flop. 3. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 2, wherein a width of the first insert decreases from a rear edge thereof where it passes under a rear attachment area of a strap of the flip-flop. 4. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 3, wherein the insert has an hourglass shape between the rear edge and a front edge thereof. 5. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 3, wherein the insert has a keyhole shape between the rear edge and a front edge thereof. 6. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , further comprising a second insert interchangeable with the first insert. 7. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , further comprising a second design element interchangeable with the first design element. 8. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , wherein the first insert includes at least one sole fastener element connected to a lower surface thereof and releasably connecting the first insert to the sole. 9. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 8, wherein the at least one sole fastener element comprises a plurality of sole fastener elements. 10. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 8, wherein the at least one sole fastener element include a tack. 11. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , wherein the first insert includes at least one design fastener element connected to a sidewall thereof and wherein the first design element includes at least one complementary design fastener element releasably connected to the at least one design fastener element of the first insert. 12. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 11 , wherein the at least one design fastener element and the at least one complementary design fastener element comprise respective pluralities of design fastener elements and complementary design fastener elements. 13. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 12, wherein the first design element includes a strap extending along the sidewall of the first insert at a rear edge thereof, the respective pluralities of design fastener elements and complementary design fastener elements include respective design fastener elements and complementary design elements at the opposite ends of the strap. 14. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 13, wherein the respective pluralities of design fastener elements and complementary design fastener elements further include a respective design fastener element and complementary design element between the opposite ends of the strap. 15. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , further comprising a second insert connected above the first insert. 16. The footwear ornamentation assembly of claim 1 , further comprising a second design element releasably connected to a side of the sole. 17. A method of using a footwear ornamentation assembly, the method comprising: releasably connecting a first design element to a sole of a footwear article; and removing the first design element from the sole and releasably connecting a second design element different in appearance from the first design element to the sole. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein the footwear article is open-heeled, and releasably connecting the first design element to the sole includes connecting a first insert to a heel area of the sole and connecting the first design element to a sidewall of the insert. 19. The method of claim 18, removing the first design element from the sole and releasably connecting a second design element different in appearance from the first design element to the sole includes removing the first design element from the sidewall of the insert and releasably connecting the second design element to the sidewall of the insert. 20. The method of claim 18, further comprising attaching a second insert to the sole above the first insert.
